title: Kaboom Crew polish r4 + engine observability tail

stories.title: Bot wander pulls toward nearby pickups
stories.summary: BotAISystem's wander path was uniform-random over safe neighbours. Now: when a Pickup is within PICKUP_RADIUS=5 manhattan and the pickup cell is NOT in the danger set, decideDirection prefers the safe neighbour that reduces manhattan distance to it. Danger-avoid still wins (the magnet picks from the already-filtered safe pool); pickups inside the danger map are skipped entirely.
verification: +2 unit tests in bot-ai-system.test.ts: bot at (3,3) with safe pickup at (5,3) deterministically picks +X across 5 ticks; bot with pickup at dangerous (5,3) does NOT lock onto +X (>1 direction in 30 ticks)
nearestPickup() scans Pickup-tagged entities, skips dangerous cells, returns the closest within PICKUP_RADIUS

stories.title: Particle burst at the winner's cell when matchPhase resolves
stories.summary: audio-binding-system grew spawnMatchEndCelebration: when matchPhase transitions out of in-progress, it spawns a `pulse` ParticleEmitter at the winner's grid cell (`won`/`lost` use RoundState.winnerId) or one at every living bomber on `draw`. Lifetime 1 s, rate 80, maxParticles 40 — reads as a celebratory burst and the engine pre-warmed pool absorbs the cost. project.json#render.particlePreWarmPresets adds 'pulse' so the shader is compiled at boot.
verification: +2 unit tests: matchPhase=won spawns one pulse emitter on the winner's cell; matchPhase=draw spawns one on every BomberStats entity

stories.title: HUD shows round elapsed / timeLimit as a thin progress bar
stories.summary: kaboom.stats HUD widget now renders a 4 px horizontal bar above the text lines, filled as elapsed / timeLimit grows. Color shifts orange when remaining <= 15 s, red when <= 5 s. Hidden when timeLimit=0 / undefined OR phase != playing — the text line keeps the precise readout.
verification: bootstrap.ts: STATS_ID widget render reads { lines, timeFrac, timeColor }; trough + fill DIVs render when timeFrac > 0
Live computation: timeFrac = elapsed/timeLimit clamped 0..1; color tiers `#5fa8ff` > 15 s, `#ff9b3a` 5–15 s, `#ff5a5a` <= 5 s
Bar suppressed when timeLimit is undefined / 0 OR phase != 'playing' (post-round banner takes over)

stories.title: runtime.kaboom.maps() + loadMap(name) for scripted map swap
stories.summary: Bootstrap consolidates the start/wide map sources into a static MAP_REGISTRY, drops `readMapName`'s special-case branch in favour of a registry lookup, and exposes `runtime.kaboom.maps()` / `loadMap(name)` / `activeMap()` on window.__agf.kaboom. attachUi seeds `activeMapName` from `?map=` once at boot; subsequent loadMap calls flip it + restart the scene through the same restartScene path.
verification: window.__agf.kaboom.loadMap('wide') flips activeMapName + triggers scene.load (returns true)
loadMap returns false when name not in MAP_REGISTRY; loadMap('start') re-loads start cleanly
URL `?map=wide` still seeds the initial activeMap; activeMap() reports the live value

stories.title: Pause menu gets an Audio toggle (mute / unmute)
stories.summary: audio-fx.ts gains setMuted/isMuted; play() returns early when muted (no AudioContext teardown so unmute is a free no-arg toggle). The Esc pause menu picks up a fourth button alongside Resume / Restart / Difficulty: `Audio: ON|OFF`. The toggle persists to the same localStorage key the existing ?audio= volume dial uses (`agf.audio.volume`) — '0' on mute, '1' on unmute.
verification: audio-fx.ts: muted flag short-circuits play(); existing audio-fx unit tests stay green
bootstrap.ts pause menu button toggles audioFx.setMuted + writes localStorage
Muted state survives a reload (localStorage takes precedence absent a ?audio= override)

stories.title: engine doctor surfaces a Systems: section from a diagnostics snapshot
stories.summary: DoctorReport gains `systems: SystemsReport | null` populated by walking the --diagnostics-from snapshot for AGF_SCHEDULER_SYSTEM_REGISTERED / _DEREGISTERED traces (HMR re-registers dedupe; deregister removes by name). formatSystems renders 'Systems (N):' followed by the name list; the section is suppressed when no lifecycle traces are present.
verification: +7 unit tests under tests/unit/doctor-systems.test.ts: null without --diagnostics-from; null when traces absent; reconstructs list; honors DEREGISTERED; dedupes HMR re-registers; format pass and empty-list path

stories.title: Per-system debug toggle via runtime.setDebugSystem(name, on)
stories.summary: SystemScheduler gains a debugSystems Set + setDebugSystem(name, enabled) toggle. When a system is on, runFixedStep / runFrame emit an info-level AGF_SYSTEM_TICK diagnostic per pass with { name, tick, phase: 'fixed'|'frame' }. unregister clears the toggle so stale entries can't fire after a scene swap. RuntimeHandle forwards via setDebugSystem; returns false when the system isn't registered.
verification: +4 unit tests under tests/unit/system-scheduler.test.ts: unknown-name returns false, fixedUpdate emits, disable silences, unregister clears the toggle

stories.title: Playwright smoke test for GET /__agf/pool-inventory
stories.summary: S88 shipped /__agf/pool-inventory but only unit-tests cover the registry math. Add a Playwright smoke test that boots hello-3d, awaits rendererReady, fetches the route, and asserts the JSON shape. Locks the surface so a future refactor that drops a pool name surfaces immediately.
verification: Asserts response contains three named pools (instanced/batched/particle) with numeric live + peak
Runs under the existing smoke project
